corpus_freeze_scope: Representative case selection, case payloads, field annotations and evidence, schema, and manifest membership as introduced by the first Gate C commit.
relation_correction_scope: Removal of invalid relation self-pairs and replacement with distinct-case relation comparisons in the Gate C evaluation commit.

hwp_hwpx.reason: Selected attachments have metadata-only capture and no authoritative Phase 3 parse result.

ocr_image.reason: No bounded authoritative OCR result was captured for the selected image-primary notice.

normalized_partial_match.reason: Predeclared partial policies exist for 17 cases, but independent element-level set/range targets are not yet adjudicated; Gate C does not substitute exact match or a model judge.

model.reason: External model extraction is prohibited in Gate C.

school_recommendation_vs_foundation_orig.reason: Phase 5 relation resolution is annotation-only in Gate C.

same_program_different_cycle.reason: Phase 5 relation resolution is annotation-only in Gate C.

deadline_extension_same_cycle.reason: Phase 5 relation resolution is annotation-only in Gate C.

result_notice_related_to_recruitment.reason: Phase 5 relation resolution is annotation-only in Gate C.

same_notice_repost_candidate.reason: Phase 5 relation resolution is annotation-only in Gate C.

recommendation.rationale: Identity usability is measured but attachment parser gaps, semantic extraction failures, and pending independent gold adjudication remain. Run targeted Phase 3 remediation and a bounded Phase 4C experiment before a Phase 5 readiness decision.
